query: SELECT oi.productId, p.name, LEFT(p.imageUrl, 80) as imgUrl, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.orderId) as orderCount FROM mall_order_items oi JOIN mall_products p ON oi.productId = p.id JOIN mall_orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id WHERE o.status IN ('paid','confirmed','shipped','delivered') GROUP BY oi.productId, p.name, p.imageUrl ORDER BY orderCount DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT oi.productId, p.name, LEFT(p.imageUrl, 80) as imgUrl, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.orderId) as orderCount FROM mall_order_items oi JOIN mall_products p ON oi.productId = p.id JOIN mall_orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id WHERE o.status IN ('paid','confirmed','shipped','delivered') GROUP BY oi.productId, p.name, p.imageUrl ORDER BY orderCount DESC LIMIT 10;
